title: laurentia armstrongii
intro: Laurentia armstrongii, also known as Armstrong's blue sage, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Laurentia armstrongii include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and provide relief from menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Laurentia armstrongii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant.
